authors.bio: Author of Atomic Habits and expert on habit formation.

authors.bio: Science fiction writer best known for hard-science novels.

authors.bio: Computer science professor and productivity author.

authors.bio: Japanese author of the Before the Coffee Gets Cold series.

authors.name: Rick Rubin
authors.bio: Music producer and author focused on creativity.

books.title: The Midnight Library
books.description: A luminous novel about regret, possibility, and choosing your life.

books.title: Atomic Habits

books.description: A hilarious and high-stakes mission to save humanity.

books.title: Deep Work
books.description: Train your focus in a distracted world.

books.title: Before the Coffee Gets Cold
books.description: Tender, time-bending stories in a quiet Tokyo cafe.

books.title: The Creative Act
books.description: A meditative guide to making things with more soul.

books.title: Klara and the Sun
books.description: A quiet, haunting story about love, care, and what it means to be human.

comments.text: One of the best sci-fi novels I've read.
